message:
feat(conformance,core): expand conformance fixtures, reliability budget, and kernel dispatch hardening

Conformance suite expansion (+427 lines in ft-conformance/src/lib.rs):
- Add comprehensive dispatch-key conformance cases: 139+ new entries
  in dispatch_key_cases.json covering autograd, sparse, quantized,
  and custom backend dispatch keys with expected resolution outcomes
- Expand scalar autograd cases (+56 lines) with gradient-tracking
  edge cases for mixed-precision and in-place operations
- Expand tensor meta cases (+54 lines) with stride/storage-offset
  validation for non-contiguous views and expand_as scenarios
- Grow the conformance gate library with structured test orchestration,
  fixture loading, and pass/fail verdict emission

Core and kernel modules:
- ft-core/src/lib.rs: add 12 lines of type-level dispatch trait
  bounds for the new dispatch key families
- ft-dispatch/src/lib.rs: add 8 lines wiring new dispatch key
  variants into the central resolver
- ft-kernel-cpu/src/lib.rs: expand CPU kernel registration with
  quantized and sparse op stubs (+28 lines)
- ft-serialize/src/lib.rs: add 4 lines for serialization support
  of new dispatch metadata

Policy:
- RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json: add 9-line reliability budget
  entry for the expanded conformance gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
